leadText: The Endorsement (Japanese: すいせんじょう Recommendation) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Allows the player to participate in the Gym Challenge .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A letter of recommendation that you'll need in order to participate in the Gym Challenge.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Allows the player to participate in the Gym Challenge . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A letter of recommendation that you'll need in order to participate in the Gym Challenge. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh Route 2 (from Leon after battling Hop )
